description_long: This shoe store features a modern, minimalist interior with marble-textured walls and floor, and a large black rug anchoring the space. The main seating area consists of a brown leather sofa facing a black marble coffee table, with a decorative book and a small sculpture on top. Behind the sofa, three large digital display screens showcase shoe products and pricing, giving the store a high-tech, contemporary feel. The left wall is lined with three large, dark-framed windows, while the right wall displays a prominent 'stockX' logo in black. The store is enclosed on three sides, with the back wall and right wall made of marble, and the left wall featuring the windows. The overall atmosphere is sleek and professional, with a focus on digital retail and clean lines.
description: A modern shoe store with marble walls, a brown leather sofa, digital display screens, and a prominent 'stockX' logo, featuring large windows and a sleek, minimalist interior.
description_view_0: The front view reveals the full interior layout, including the brown sofa, black marble coffee table, digital display screens, and the 'stockX' logo on the right wall.
description_view_1: This side view shows the marble-textured exterior wall and the edge of the digital display screens, with the tops of the sofa and windows barely visible.
description_view_2: The rear view highlights the marble back wall, with the tops of the digital screens and sofa visible above the wall.
description_view_3: The opposite side view displays a solid black exterior wall, with the 'stockX' logo partially visible and the sofa just peeking over the wall.
attribute_storefront_signage: A large black 'stockX' logo is mounted on the right marble wall, featuring bold, modern typography and a prominent 'X' symbol.
attribute_display_windows: Three large, dark-framed display windows are present on the left wall, each extending nearly from floor to ceiling, with no visible decorative elements or window displays.
attribute_shoe_advertisements: Three digital display screens behind the sofa show shoe images, product details, and pricing, serving as high-tech advertisements within the store.
